feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Community
feed.subtitle: SAP Community Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Active contributors against spam attacks
entry.content:
Spam attacks are still massively ongoing. In 2015, SAP community had to "temporarily stop all new accounts from being created", I hope that it won't happen again, and that the next Community version will get rid of this spam.

Just to say, before this feature is available, if possible, please grant the active contributors the right to deactivate these spam users, at least during the weekend, because a lot of spam remains present for 2 days and pollutes the place, I'm often present the weekend, and other active contributors are maybe present too.

entry.title: Disable the icon
entry.content:
hello

I want to create a variant of the FMCACOV transaction to disable the « CHOOSE LAYOUT » icon, but it does not work because the variant does not allow me to access that icon.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Images in old blog posts are not accessible
entry.content:
Recently, I noticed that some images on blog posts created before the migration to the current platform are not accessible. The screenshot below is from one of my blog posts.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-share-tables-across-different-cap-projects/ba-p/13497184

I hope this will be fixed, as blog posts with broken images are less appealing and harder to understand.

entry.title: OEL's are not save on listed substance after laoding the data from OCC
entry.content: what could be the problem or has anyone experience this ?

entry.title: sales order hedder level shipping field is showing blank loading dale, availability date
GTIN mass updates
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to mass update GTINs for specific unit of measures. I have tried using MM17,I see an option for EAN/UPC for 12-character values, but I can't figure it out how to do it for the GTINs that required the 14-character values.

Thanks

entry.title: How to deregister an account from SAP Community?
entry.content:
Mistakenly I registered one account for SAP community and need to de-register it immediately. Can please help to know how it can be done without affecting any other access? Only have to deregister for SAP community.

Thanks.

entry.title: REMADV IDOC for Clearing Customer Credit Memo
entry.content:
Team, 

I have configured the REMADV IDOC to clear customer invoices and customer credit memos, but I am unable to clear the credit memo documents. I’m receiving a message indicating that the difference is too large. I'm not sure if REMADV has the capability to handle such scenarios. Could someone provide guidance on this?

FIN (Finance) FIN Accounts Receivable and Payable

entry.title: Descuentos por pronto pago Inactiva
entry.content:
Hola,

En nuestra empresa hemos acordado aplicar descuentos por pronto pago a proveedores para compras recurrentes. Al intentar configurar estas condiciones de pago y parametrizar los descuentos, nos dimos cuenta de que la opción no está disponible en el sistema.

Nos comunicamos con nuestro partner y nos informaron que esta funcionalidad está disponible solo para regiones específicas. Sin embargo, nos mencionaron que si deseamos implementar esta opción, sería necesario desarrollar una solución personalizada.

Mi duda es si realmente es necesario este desarrollo, ya que al revisar la base de datos, encontramos que sí tenemos acceso a la tabla correspondiente

Adjunto una imagen de referencia para que puedan tener una mejor idea de lo que estamos viendo.

Hola,

En nuestra empresa hemos acordado aplicar descuentos por pronto pago a proveedores para compras recurrentes. Al intentar configurar estas condiciones de pago y parametrizar los descuentos, nos dimos cuenta de que la opción no está disponible en el sistema.

Nos comunicamos con nuestro partner y nos informaron que esta funcionalidad está disponible solo para regiones específicas. Sin embargo, nos mencionaron que si deseamos implementar esta opción, sería necesario desarrollar una solución personalizada.

Mi duda es si realmente es necesario este desarrollo, ya que al revisar la base de datos, encontramos que sí tenemos acceso a la tabla correspondiente

Adjunto una imagen de referencia para que puedan tener una mejor idea de lo que estamos viendo.

Imagen con la opción activada

   Imagen con la opción desactivada

Agradezco cualquier ayuda o sugerencia sobre cómo proceder.

entry.title: sap analytics cloud
entry.content: Is there any way to do joins of table in modeler in sac?

entry.title: Exceed Budget in posting MIRO Invoice for PR, PO in WBS
entry.content:
Hello guys, I have a problem like this:

1. I created project, WBS level 1 level 2, Network, Activity (internal) and Material Component.

2. I released project and assign budget for the project in cj30, and cj32.

3. I used the PR created in the Material Component to create PO and it charged commitment budget to my WBS and network activity.

4. I post goods receipt and then go to MIRO t-code.

5. I posted invoice for the PO that created from the PR of the material component and the system raise the error: In document item 003 Ntwk actvty 310000057 0010, budget for WBS element O.999987 for fiscal year 2024 was exceeded by 200.000.000 VND.

Although I have budgeted and released the budget for the WBS, there were 200.000.000 VND in the commitment and the MIRO didn't take it and raise the error: Budget Exceed.

Please help me with this problem.

entry.title: SAP FICO Certification
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am preparing for FICO certification doing practice and i need guidance how to apply for exam and any book suggestion for SAP FICO.

also kindly suggest how to move to SAP FICO Team am part of financial team for 12 years

 

Regards,

Sairam.N

entry.title: Best practices using SAP_ALL for implementations
entry.content:
Hi there, 

I am currently leading the end-to-end implementation of the embedded EWM module. As we approach the cutover phase in the client’s production environment, I have requested broad access permissions to perform certain client-specific technical activities. These activities often involve complex object configurations that do not follow the typical transport order process. Given these requirements, I believe it is necessary to have a temporary, consultant-level user role with SAP_ALL access. However, the client has raised concerns about audit compliance and is hesitant to grant this access.

Is there any official documentation or best practice guideline available that supports the need for extended permissions during critical implementation phases? This would help the client understand the necessity of SAP_ALL for certain technical tasks during cutover and allow us to proceed effectively

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Meaningless "posted a topic/replied to topic", instead use "question", "discussion", "blog article"
entry.content:
I see in my Notification feed questions, discussions and blog posts which are all tagged "posted a new topic" or "replied to topic", and I need to look at the picture to know if it's a question, a blog post or even a discussion. It has taken me months to change my habit from going from the text to the picture, in fact I have to look at both parts, the kind of topic, and the topic title. Why not having the whole information in the text? Proposing to replace "topic" with either "question", "discussion" or "blog article".

Here, it's a question:

It's a blog post:

It's a discussion:

Surprisingly, "topic" is not used in "commented on blog article":

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: SAP Blog in Awaiting Review
entry.content: How long it will take for moderators to approve the blog. My blog is in Awaiting Review for more than a week

entry.title: SAP Community issues when posting new blogs
entry.content:
Dear Community colleagues,

I encountered the following issues when posting blogs in https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/bg-p/erp-blog-sap

  • SAP Managed Tags can't be saved and need enter again in case you need to re-edit a blog;
  • Loading performance is too bad when create or re-edit a blog which is not user-friendly for blogger;
  • Part of blog content can't be saved , example: if hyperlink is the start of the line of a blog, it will remove it and not to be saved which could be a bug;

Can anyone double check these issues?

Thanks in advance!

Br Bob

entry.title: How does your personality influence the way you approach problem-solving in SAP projects?
entry.content:
Do you think your personality plays a role in how you approach problem-solving in SAP projects? For instance, analytical individuals might rely heavily on data and logic to troubleshoot, while creative thinkers might look for out-of-the-box solutions. Collaborative personalities may focus on teamwork to resolve issues, whereas independent personalities might dive deep into self-research.

In your experience with SAP, have you noticed how your unique traits influence your workflow, learning style, or the way you tackle challenges? I'd love to hear how personality impacts the way you use SAP tools and collaborate within teams!

entry.title: Archiving DBTABLOG, lot of POWL_SELCRIT records
entry.content:
We are in process of doing Archiving of DBTABLOG, and I can see that the majority of records are related to POWL_SELCRIT.

Is there any reason to keep those archives, or can we just delete the archive related to POWL_SELCRIT table in DBTABLOG.

Should we just turn off logging for POWL_SELCRIT?

entry.title: Deleting Blog Post
entry.content:
Hello,

how can I delete an already published blog post?

thanks.

br Conny

entry.title: Where are my blogs I have linkedin my IDs and now what I have is a new id with no historical data
entry.content:
PL advise where are my previous blogs , posts, questions etc

Why do SAP have to keep changing something that works
